NY.condition: exempt if item price < 110.00; taxable if item price >= 110.00
NY.notes: The threshold applies per item, evaluated against the unit price.

groceries.description: Unprepared food items for home consumption

prepared_food.description: Ready-to-eat meals, hot food, restaurant food

NY.notes: Shipping is taxable when shipped with taxable items. If all items in the order are exempt, shipping is also exempt.

CA.condition: Shipping is taxable only if any item in the order is taxable. If all items are exempt, shipping is exempt.
CA.notes: All-or-nothing — there is no proportional calculation in this simplified version.

TX.notes: Shipping is taxable when shipped with taxable items. If all items in the order are exempt, shipping is also exempt.

exemption_certificates.description: Valid exemption certificates remove tax liability

resale.description: Buyer is purchasing for resale, not end use
resale.effect: All sales tax removed (state + local) on all items. Shipping is also exempt.

rounding_rules.description: For each line item, calculate tax separately for each jurisdiction (rate * line value), round to nearest cent (0.005 rounds up), then sum the per-jurisdiction taxes for the item total.
